title: [Floor of the Ravine]
description: Flowing swiftly by the bank, the fast-moving river sweeps past, carrying debris and floatsam away and out of sight.  A cool breeze blows constantly through the narrow confines of the ravine, tugging at the leaves of a brown weed clinging to the surface of a small ledge.  Piled up at the base of the ravine's walls are small drifts of sand, intermixed with broken limbs and large stones.

wayto.16725: ;e if resolve = Spell[9704] and resolve.known? and resolve.affordable? and not resolve.active?; resolve.cast; end; move 'climb ledge'; waitrt?
wayto.16729: ;e if resolve = Spell[9704] and resolve.known? and resolve.affordable? and not resolve.active?; resolve.cast; end; move 'swim river'; waitrt?
